mapper.select:
SELECT t1.ID, t1.REPAIR_CONTARCT_ID, t1.REPAIR_NAME, t1.ID_CARD, t1.PHONE, t1.CREATE_BY, t1.CREATE_BY_NAME, t2.unit_name repairContarctName FROM E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_USER t1 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT t2 on t1.REPAIR_CONTARCT_ID = t2.ID where t2.deleted = 0
and t1.ID = #{id}
SELECT ID, REPAIR_USER_ID, CERTIFICATE_TYPE, CERTIFICATE_NAME, CERTIFICATE_TIME FROM E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_USER_DETAIL WHERE REPAIR_USER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_USER ( ID, REPAIR_CONTARCT_ID, REPAIR_NAME, ID_CARD, PHONE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{repairContarctId}, #{repairName}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT ALL
INTO E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_USER_DETAIL ( ID, REPAIR_USER_ID, CERTIFICATE_TYPE, CERTIFICATE_NAME, CERTIFICATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{item.id}, #{item.repairUserId}, #{item.certificateType}, #{item.certificateName}, #{item.certificateTime}, #{item.loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.loginUserName}, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.update: update E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_USER set REPAIR_CONTARCT_ID = #{repairContarctId}, REPAIR_NAME = #{repairName}, ID_CARD = #{idCard}, PHONE = #{phone}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ID = #{id}
